issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Low-latency voice agent TTS
scenarios.rationale: Baseline relies on the legacy generate/stream helpers and the multilingual model; treatment uses convert_as_stream with eleven_turbo_v2_5 and pcm_24000 as the SKILL specifies for WebRTC pipelines.

scenarios.name: Voice cloning + streaming greeting
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses the deprecated clone helper without streaming; treatment uses client.voices.add with the documented arguments and reuses the returned voice_id in a turbo streaming call.
